title: callista leonis
intro: Callista leonis, also known as the pride of India or Indian cobra's hood, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Callista leonis include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Callista leonis include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
